name: Employee Rules of the Night Strings
short_description: This is a bartender simulation game. While mixing drinks that satisfy customers, you also need to carefully identify whether the guests in front of you are human or something similar to human.
detailed_description:
Welcome to the Night String Bar. Tonight's work is up to you.
Don't worry, your job is just to mix drinks for the guests. It's very simple, isn't it?
So relax a little, this will help you complete the work and... leave here alive.
————————————————————————————
It is a bartender simulation game. You will select the right ingredients to mix drinks that satisfy customers according to their needs in the Night String Bar.
Please note that in addition to ordinary customers, there are many creatures that look similar but are definitely not human in this bar. Taking good care of these special guests is also one of the focuses of your job!
